hooks.command: echo 'Bug Bounty session started. Run /scope <target> to confirm in-scope assets, then /init to create the workspace, or /recon to continue an active target.'
echo 'Session ended. Save findings to programs/{target}/vulns/tracker.md. Run /validate on any leads before the next session.'
echo 'Hunt complete. Checklist: findings saved? scope verified? reports in reports/? run /validate on any unvalidated leads.'
